BARN BLOWN DOWN AND ROOF DAMAGE TO HOMES. POSSIBLE TORNADO.

EF1 TORNADO CONFIRMED. THE INITIAL TOUCHDOWN OF THE TORNADO WAS NEAR THE CORNER OF GARDNER AND EAGLE FACTORY ROAD NEAR WEST LOWVILLE. ALTHOUGH THE PATH LENGTH WAS 10 MILES LONG...THE TORNADO WAS NOT ON THE GROUND FOR THE ENTIRE TIME. THE LAST SIGNS OF DAMAGE WERE FOUND IN THE CROGHAN AREA. IN ALL ABOUT A DOZEN BUILDINGS WERE DAMAGED. THE MAX PATH WIDTH WAS 300 YARDS WITH A MAXIMUM ESTIMATED WIND SPEED OF 95-100 MPH.
